name: leetcode-tracker-ai
description: Agentic Data Orchestration for LeetCode tracking

scripts.install:backend: cd backend && python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.install:all: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.start: npx concurrently "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:backend"

author: Caleb Hageman
